235                 INSERT INTO admin_settings (key, value) VALUES ($1, $2)
236                 ON CONFLICT (key) DO NOTHING
237             """, k, v)

240 async def get_setting(key: str, default: Optional[str] = None) -> Optional[str]:
241     pool = await get_pool()
242     async with pool.acquire() as conn:
243         row = await conn.fetchrow("SELECT value FROM admin_settings WHERE key = $1", key)
244     if row is not None:
245         return row["value"]
246     if key in DEFAULTS:
247         return DEFAULTS[key]
248     return default
